sources.name: finsilabs/awesome-ecommerce-skills
sources.notes: Imported the full ecommerce skill library and reorganized it into category-first paths under skills/<category>/finsilabs/.

sources.name: openclaw/skills

removed_skills.reason: Overly broad autonomous authority over financially impactful ecommerce operations.
Trusts mutable remote third-party skill files as the source of truth.
Provides destructive live Shopify mutations without runtime confirmation guards.

sources.notes: Filtered for direct ecommerce relevance, then reorganized into category-first paths; three imported skills were later removed after security review.

sources.name: awesome-ecommerce-skills.com/library
sources.notes: Confirmed as a web catalog for the same finsilabs library, so no separate import was created.

sources.name: Reddit ClaudeAI thread
sources.notes: The post listed skill names but did not expose downloadable files or canonical source repos for reliable import.
